texto: Unchecked pride evolves into swagger, a hypnotizing mask of insecurity that can and does compromise our ability to make progress and attain power. Pride stands in the way of forgiveness and a strategic approach to navigating a chessboard rigged to prevent pawns from becoming kings and queens.
explicacao: Citação de Jason Whitlock sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Unchecked pride evolves into swagger, a hypnotizing mask of insecurity that can and does compromi…” articula reflexao, empowerment, pride em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como pride.
